personal_opener.quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it. - Peter Drucker

articles.title: Securing AI in Healthcare: What Compliance Must Do Before the Questions Become Consequences
articles.summary: Healthcare compliance teams scrambling to evaluate AI tools through structured risk frameworks. Gap between adoption (78%) and governance maturity (<1%) is massive.
articles.linkedin_angle: Every healthcare CIO I talk to has the same dirty secret: They're using AI everywhere but governing it nowhere. Here's the 4-question framework that separates the leaders from the laggards...

articles.title: Adoption of AI in U.S. Clinics: Trends, Data & Future Outlook
articles.summary: AI scribes are mainstream but dangerous without human oversight. Clinics must review every note before patient records.
articles.linkedin_angle: AI scribes can kill patients if you trust them blindly. After reviewing 10,000+ AI-generated notes, here's what every clinic director needs to know about the hidden risks...

articles.title: St. James Hospital Dublin's Giunti Says AI Transformation Starts With Literacy
articles.summary: Critical governance insight: Anyone requesting AI tools must accept personal accountability for entire lifecycle.
articles.linkedin_angle: Want to see AI governance that actually works? Dublin hospital has one rule: 'If you request it, you own it.' Personal accountability just solved healthcare's biggest AI problem...

articles.title: How AI is plugging in to doctor's offices, emergency rooms
articles.summary: Dr. Ryan Choudhury warns AI has outpaced governmental and safety regulations. Rapid adoption in clinical settings without proper oversight.
articles.linkedin_angle: A hospice doctor just said what every healthcare leader is thinking: 'AI has outpaced our ability to regulate it safely.' The regulation gap is the real opportunity...

articles.title: AI and Mental Healthcare – ethical and regulatory considerations
articles.summary: Government briefing on ethical implications and regulatory considerations for AI in mental healthcare.
articles.linkedin_angle: Parliament just released their AI healthcare ethics briefing. Guess what's missing? Any mention of runtime governance. Here's why that's the trillion-dollar oversight...
